app.name: GrantHelper
app.tagline: Grants matched to your real profile

hero.title: Grants that fit your real profile
hero.subtitle: Add your GPA, test scores, activities and documents. GrantHelper checks you against real eligibility requirements and shows exactly where you stand.

matchPreview.title: Your matches
matchPreview.basis: Based on GPA 3.6, IELTS 7.0, 120 volunteer hours

step1.title: Build your profile
step1.text: GPA, SAT, IELTS, volunteering, projects and documents in one place.

step2.title: Get matched
step2.text: Every grant has structured requirements and we compare them with your numbers.

step3.title: Apply with confidence
step3.text: Track deadlines, statuses and required documents for each application.

profile.title: Academic profile
profile.text: Store GPA and every test score with dates.

eligibility.title: Eligibility engine
eligibility.text: See eligible, borderline and not eligible grants instantly.

documents.title: Documents and essays
documents.text: Keep drafts and final files ready for submission.

tracker.title: Deadline tracker
tracker.text: Never miss an application window again.
